sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102784" key="teqrippotro/fos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεθριππο-τρόφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">τρέφω</etym>) <sense id="n102784.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">keeping a team of four horses</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οἰκίη τ</foreign>., i.e. a wealthy family that could support this the most expensive contest in the games, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0016.tlg001.perseus-grc1:35" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">35</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
